title: Incredibly Rich Spanish Beans Fabada Asturiana
description: A rich and cozy Spanish dish featuring rapeseed oil and ferment-kimchi, perfect for a flexitarian-friendly meal. This recipe combines the flavors of Spain with a twist of Korean kimchi.

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Heat the rapeseed oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the ferment-kimchi, spanish beans, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the fabada asturiana hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
